title: Canara Bank Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Canara Bank Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Canara Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Gurgaon location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Canara Bank Capital India:
Canara Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank Capital India!
